protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Cells washed twice with ice-cold TNE buffer; harvested by centrifugation at 500xg; homogenized in ice-cold TNE buffer; subjected to lipid extraction.

protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Detergent treatment (Triton X-100, DDM, OG) used to test virus sensitivity, not lysis for downstream amplification; washing and centrifugation used.
